title: Man Charged in Fatal Bicycle Accident Involving 8-Year-Old
summary: Khaliyal Burney faces new charges after allegedly striking and killing 8-year-old Nyomi Summers while she was riding her bike.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by young cyclists and the severe consequences of reckless driving.

title: Bicyclist Killed in York County Collision
summary: A bicyclist was fatally struck from behind by a Jeep Cherokee near Ross Brook Trace, prompting safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about bicycle safety and the need for drivers to be vigilant.

title: Death Investigation Underway in East Charlotte
summary: A body was discovered along The Plaza, linked to a missing person report, leading to an active investigation by CMPD.
charlotte_impact: Underscores the ongoing efforts to address crime and ensure public safety in Charlotte.

title: Charlotte Program Promotes Early Literacy with 'Big Read' Event
summary: Community leaders and students gathered to emphasize the importance of reading at a young age through the 'Big Read' event.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community investment in education and the promotion of literacy among young children.

title: Couple Seriously Injured in Catawba County Home Explosion
summary: A couple sustained serious injuries in a home explosion, while their 14-year-old daughter escaped the fire.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of home safety and the potential dangers of explosions.

title: Tiawana Brown's Daughter Pleads Guilty in Fraud Scheme
summary: The daughter of Tiawana Brown pleaded guilty in a fraud scheme case during a hearing on Wednesday, April 1.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the consequences of fraudulent activities and the legal proceedings involved.

title: SCDPH Opens Portal for Health Care Complaint Submissions
summary: The South Carolina Department of Public Health (SCDPH) launched an online portal for submitting complaints about health care facilities.
charlotte_impact: Enhances transparency and accountability in the healthcare system.

title: Fatal Shooting in Northwest Charlotte
summary: One person was killed in a shooting in northwest Charlotte; detectives believe the incident was not random.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on the community.

title: One Injured in South Charlotte Crash
summary: A crash on Ardrey Kell Road and Blakeney Professional Drive resulted in one injury.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of the importance of safe driving practices.

title: Charlotte Nonprofit Launches Cash Program for LGBTQ+ Youth
summary: A Charlotte nonprofit is providing $200,000 in direct cash assistance to LGBTQ+ youth facing housing instability.
charlotte_impact: Addresses housing insecurity within the LGBTQ+ community.

title: Spring Warmth Builds with Rain Chances
summary: The region will experience unseasonably warm temperatures, peaking at 84, with possible showers and storms mid-week and Friday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast for the Charlotte area.

title: Arrest Made in Waxhaw Drug Bust
summary: At least one arrest has been made in connection with a drug bust in Waxhaw; details are limited as the investigation is ongoing.
charlotte_impact: Highlights law enforcement efforts to combat drug-related crime.

title: School Board Member Faces Resignation Calls Over Islamophobic Post
summary: A Gastonia school board member is facing scrutiny and calls for resignation after a controversial social media post.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of discrimination and accountability in public office.

title: Duke Energy Rate Hike Sparks Customer Concerns
summary: Customers express concern over Duke Energy's proposed rate hike, which could increase residential bills by up to 18%.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the financial impact of utility rate increases on residents.

title: Teenager Injured in Overnight Shooting
summary: A 15-year-old was shot in the chest on Carlyle Drive early Wednesday, according to police reports.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the issue of youth violence and gun-related incidents.
